faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Answers to the most common questions about website development, SEO, and Google Ads services.

price.question: How much does a website cost?
price.answer: The cost depends on the type of project, required functionality, and overall complexity. After a short consultation, we provide a clear estimate with no hidden costs.

timeline.question: How long does it take to build a website?
timeline.answer: Landing pages are usually completed within 1–2 weeks, while larger business websites or e-commerce projects may take longer depending on the scope and integrations.

seo.question: Do you provide SEO optimization?
seo.answer: Yes. Every website is built with modern SEO fundamentals including clean structure, responsive design, performance optimization, and technical best practices.

ads.question: Do you help with Google Ads campaigns?
ads.answer: Yes. Besides website development, we also help businesses grow through Google Ads campaigns, keyword strategy, optimization, and conversion-focused improvements.

editing.question: Can I edit the website myself after launch?
editing.answer: Yes. Depending on the project, we can integrate a simple content management solution so you can update texts, images, or blog posts yourself.

technologies.question: What technologies do you use?
technologies.answer: We primarily use React, TypeScript, Node.js, and modern scalable technologies focused on performance, maintainability, and long-term growth.

responsive.question: Will my website work well on mobile devices?
responsive.answer: Absolutely. Every website is fully responsive and optimized for smartphones, tablets, and desktop devices.

support.question: Do you provide support after launch?
support.answer: Yes. We continue supporting projects after launch and can help with updates, maintenance, SEO improvements, analytics, and future scaling.
